title: Dune Striders
description: Dune Striders introduces craftable armadillo scute boots that give the material a brand-new purpose. Equipping these boots grants players a helpful speed boost whenever they travel across sand blocks.
body:
Dune Striders 🏜️

A lightweight vanilla+ mod that gives Armadillo Scutes a highly requested secondary use!

## The Concept Armadillo scutes currently only have one use: crafting Wolf Armor. This mod adds a brand new utility armor piece called **Dune Striders**, crafted directly from Armadillo Scutes. When equipped, these boots grant the player a slight speed boost (Speed I) **only** when walking on: - Sand - Red Sand - Suspicious Sand ## Why Dune Striders? It perfectly fits the vanilla aesthetic and the savanna/badlands vibe of the Armadillo. The lightweight, tough composition of the scutes allows players to traverse desert environments rapidly, making exploring and excavating much more engaging! ## Features - **New Item**: Dune Striders (Armadillo Scute Boots) - **Crafting Recipe**: Crafted just like standard boots but using Armadillo Scutes (requires 4 scutes). - **Dynamic Effect**: The Speed I buff is applied dynamically and feels vanilla-native, instantly boosting your speed as you stride across the dunes. - **Vanilla Enchantability**: Fully compatible with normal boots enchantments at the Enchanting Table and Anvil (Mending, Unbreaking, Feather Falling, Depth Strider, etc.). - **New 'Dune Speed' Enchantment**: A brand new custom enchantment specifically for the Dune Striders! It can be found on books or in the Enchanting Table, with a max tier of Level 3. Each level upgrades the dynamic sand speed buff by an extra degree (Dune Speed III grants Speed IV!). ## Compatibility This mod is fully server-side compatible but required on the client for the items to show properly. It requires the Fabric API.
